original_image_tags: A photograph of a small, light-colored rectangular index card or label. The card has typed text and a stamped number. The card is oriented horizontally against a dark background.

elements.description: A blank off-white card with typed text in the upper-left corner. The text reads: '8 1 9', followed by '"Flying Disc" Found Saybrook, Ill. 7-26-47'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the visual content: a single light-colored, off-white card with typed text in the upper-left corner and a stamped number, viewed as a photograph.
